title: Software Update - DFU -  Houston...  Retry button
scenario: DFU failure at 10% followed by Retry does not navigate back to the Software Update screen to restart the update process
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Pair the Poly Bluetooth headset with the Android device via the app's Home screen.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the paired [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
5. On the Software Update screen, tap 'Update'.
7. On the next prompt, tap 'Start Update' to begin the DFU process.
8. When the update progress reaches approximately 10%, press and hold the Power button on the headset to turn it off, triggering a DFU failure.
9. On the failure screen, tap the 'Retry' button.
expected: User is directed to the previous Software Update screen where the update process will attempt again.
